disclaimer: Educational and devotional local knowledge graph. Formal ritual, astrological and historical decisions should be verified with trusted traditional authorities.

nodes.title: Lord Murugan
nodes.summary: Central deity of the platform, associated with wisdom, courage, youth, victory, compassion and spiritual discipline.

nodes.title: Vel
nodes.summary: The divine spear symbolising wisdom that cuts ignorance and protects devotees.

nodes.title: Peacock
nodes.summary: Murugan's vahana, representing beauty, alertness, grace and victory over ego.

nodes.title: Rooster Flag
nodes.summary: The rooster banner represents awakening, courage and victory in Murugan tradition.

nodes.title: Valli
nodes.summary: Valli represents loving devotion, simplicity and the intimate path of grace.

nodes.title: Deivanai
nodes.summary: Deivanai represents divine order, discipline and celestial dharma in Murugan tradition.

nodes.title: Arupadai Veedu
nodes.summary: The six sacred abodes of Lord Murugan, forming a major pilgrimage and study path.

nodes.title: Palani Murugan Temple
nodes.summary: Arupadai Veedu associated with wisdom, renunciation and Dhandayuthapani.

nodes.title: Thiruchendur Murugan Temple
nodes.summary: Seashore Arupadai Veedu associated with victory over Surapadman and Skanda Sashti.

nodes.title: Thirupparamkundram Murugan Temple
nodes.summary: Arupadai Veedu connected with divine marriage tradition and early Murugan worship.

nodes.title: Swamimalai Murugan Temple
nodes.summary: Arupadai Veedu where Murugan is revered as the guru who explains pranava wisdom.

nodes.title: Tiruttani Murugan Temple
nodes.summary: Arupadai Veedu associated with peace, balance and the quieting of anger after victory.

nodes.title: Pazhamudircholai Murugan Temple
nodes.summary: Arupadai Veedu near Madurai associated with nature, grace and complete blessing.

nodes.title: Vayalur Murugan Temple
nodes.summary: A revered Murugan temple connected with Arunagirinathar and Thiruppugazh tradition.

nodes.title: Marudhamalai Murugan Temple
nodes.summary: Hill temple near Coimbatore associated with Murugan devotion and Siddhar tradition.

nodes.title: Om Saravana Bhava
nodes.summary: Six-syllable mantra used for focus, protection and devotional connection.

nodes.title: Kanda Sashti Kavasam
nodes.summary: A celebrated devotional hymn seeking Murugan's protection and grace.

nodes.title: Shanmuga Kavacham
nodes.summary: A Murugan protection hymn traditionally recited for courage and spiritual shelter.

nodes.title: Subramanya Bhujangam
nodes.summary: A Sanskrit hymn to Lord Subramanya often associated with deep devotion and surrender.

nodes.title: Thiruppugazh
nodes.summary: Sacred Murugan hymns composed by Arunagirinathar, known for rhythm and devotion.

nodes.title: Kandar Anuboothi
nodes.summary: A revered Murugan work of Arunagirinathar focused on spiritual realization.

nodes.title: Thai Poosam
nodes.summary: Major Murugan festival associated with devotion, kavadi, vows and the Vel.

nodes.title: Skanda Sashti
nodes.summary: Six-day observance remembering Murugan's victory over Surapadman.

nodes.title: Panguni Uthiram
nodes.summary: Festival connected with divine marriages, vows and Murugan's consorts.

nodes.title: Vaikasi Visakam
nodes.summary: Festival celebrating Murugan's birth star Visakam in the Tamil month of Vaikasi.

nodes.title: Karthigai Deepam
nodes.summary: Festival of lamps connected with divine light, devotion and Murugan worship traditions.

guidedQuestions: Show me the six Arupadai Veedu temples
Why is Palani associated with wisdom and renunciation?
Which slokas are connected with protection?
What is the relationship between Thai Poosam and the Vel?
What should I read for Skanda Sashti?
